name: Ideogram 4
note: [Ideogram 4](https://huggingface.co/ideogram-ai/ideogram-4-fp8) is a 9.3-billion-parameter open-weight text-to-image foundation model trained from scratch. It excels at multilingual text rendering and design-oriented generation, and supports structured JSON prompts with explicit layout, bounding-box, and color-palette controls. It generates natively at 2K resolution and is released under the Ideogram 4 Non-Commercial license; 48 sampling steps are recommended for highest quality.
